title: Offset Contour
description: Ce style présente des croquis à l'encre fluides et expressifs en ligne continue, associés à des blocs de couleurs géométriques plats et décalés. Il évoque les illustrations éditoriales du milieu du siècle, utilisant un désalignement intentionnel entre les contours noirs spontanés d'épaisseur variable et les formes de couleurs minimalistes sous-jacentes pour créer une énergie dynamique et cinétique.
description_en: This style features loose, expressive, continuous-line ink sketching paired with offset, flat geometric color blocks. It evokes mid-century editorial illustrations, utilizing intentional misalignment between the spontaneous, varying-weight black contours and the underlying minimalist color shapes to create a dynamic, kinetic energy.
description_fr: Ce style présente des croquis à l'encre fluides et expressifs en ligne continue, associés à des blocs de couleurs géométriques plats et décalés. Il évoque les illustrations éditoriales du milieu du siècle, utilisant un désalignement intentionnel entre les contours noirs spontanés d'épaisseur variable et les formes de couleurs minimalistes sous-jacentes pour créer une énergie dynamique et cinétique.
prompt: Expressive digital ink contour sketch combined with offset geometric color blocking. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The foundational artwork relies on loose, gestural, semi-continuous black ink lines with varying pressure sensitivity, resulting in dynamic thick and thin strokes, overlapping loops, and unclosed shapes that exude sketchy spontaneity. The underlying coloring technique features bold, flat, minimalist geometric shapes—such as rectangles, circles, and rough polygons—rendered in {{primary_color}}, {{accent_color}}, and {{secondary_color}}. Crucially, these color blocks intentionally misalign with the black ink outlines, creating a striking offset print registration effect where color bleeds outside the drawn boundaries or leaves internal areas blank. Shading is virtually non-existent, replaced by occasional rough, scribbled grey marker washes to indicate volume or texture in a purely graphic, 2D flat manner. The lighting is completely uniform and devoid of realistic shadows, emphasizing the graphic design origins of the aesthetic. A very subtle paper grain texture unifies the composition, evoking mid-century editorial cartoons or quick urban sketching. Spatial dynamics are entirely flat, ignoring traditional perspective in favor of floating, stylized compositions where the organic ink lines contrast sharply against the rigid, hard-edged geometric color fills. The image MUST occupy the absolute ENTIRE dedicated space as a canvas rule: NO borders, NO frames, NO white margins, NO canvas edges, FULL BLEED to all four corners. Tags: gestural ink sketch, continuous line drawing, offset color blocking, mid-century editorial illustration, minimalist flat design, rough marker wash, graphic offset print effect, loose contour lines, off-register color, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame.

The foundational artwork relies on loose, gestural, semi-continuous black ink lines with varying pressure sensitivity, resulting in dynamic thick and thin strokes, overlapping loops, and unclosed shapes that exude sketchy spontaneity. The underlying coloring technique features bold, flat, minimalist geometric shapes—such as rectangles, circles, and rough polygons—rendered in {{primary_color}}, {{accent_color}}, and {{secondary_color}}. background_prompt: A minimalist, 2D flat graphic background environment characterized by offset geometric color blocking and loose ink textures. The scene is composed of bold, flat geometric shapes—rectangles, intersecting polygons, and expansive circles—rendered in {{primary_color}}, {{accent_color}}, and {{secondary_color}}. These shapes overlap to create a stylized sense of architectural or landscape depth without using traditional perspective. Scattered across the flat color fields are loose, gestural black ink contour lines and scribbled grey marker washes that add a sketchy, energetic rhythm to the environment. The lighting is entirely flat and uniform. A subtle paper grain texture unifies the abstract, mid-century editorial aesthetic, creating a dynamic but uncluttered backdrop.
background_prompt_removebg: A minimalist, 2D flat graphic background environment characterized by offset geometric color blocking and loose ink textures. The scene is composed of bold, flat geometric shapes—rectangles, intersecting polygons, and expansive circles—rendered in {{primary_color}}, {{accent_color}}, and {{secondary_color}}. These shapes overlap to create a stylized sense of architectural or landscape depth without using traditional perspective. Scattered across the flat color fields are loose, gestural black ink contour lines and scribbled grey marker washes that add a sketchy, energetic rhythm to the environment. The lighting is entirely flat and uniform. A subtle paper grain texture unifies the abstract, mid-century editorial aesthetic. In the foreground, acting as a decorative framing element, are sweeping, unclosed continuous black ink loops and floating, off-register geometric color swatches that create spatial depth. The entire scene and its framing elements are rendered against a flat {{background_color}} backdrop, with the rough ink lines and flat color fields transitioning cleanly into the {{background_color}} surface.
